## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Knowledge update
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or build
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe how you tested the changes.

- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] Ran `make test`
- [ ] Ran `make lint`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code standards
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] No internet connectivity is required for new features
- [ ] RTL (Arabic) layout is not broken
